title: Tubtrugs 36L Large Flexible 2-Handled Recycled Tub, Orange
description: Product Description FCL Tubtrugs flexible 2 handled recycled tub perfect for gardening, household, DIY, bedroom storage, toys, arts and crafts, educational, schools, garage, boating, beach, shopping, catering or for pets, livestock and many more. Comfort-grip handles, ideal for carrying in one hand. Chamfered edge for easy sweeping. Flexible sides for shaping against a wall or floor. Super-strong handle joints. Reinforced ribbing for extra strength. Food grade, brand leader, non-toxic, environment friendly, frost resistant, UV ray resistant and toy safe. Available in orange colour. It comes in large size. 32 litre capacity. Measures 45cm diameter by 33cm height. Manufacturer's Description Very versatile - ideal for mixing, collecting, pouring, scooping, building and even carrying. Why not get a couple of different colours and use them for different jobs? As they are so bright you can always find them in the garden! Even the professionals use tub trugs - Sarah Raven raves about them. Holds 32 litres Measures 31cm high x 32cm wide base, 43cm wide top 100% recycled UV Sunlight proof Made in the EU Box Contains 1 x Tubtrug Tub See more
